name: Kiara | Left Alone
description:
Her friends are too "busy" for her, so she comes to you, her roommate


Kiara has been your tomboy (and muscular) roommate for the past several months. She likes manga, anime, and other series, but she likes spending time with her friends the most. Today, on one of the last days of her college break, she had a gaming day planned with her best friend. The issue is... he ditched her without any warning, busy with his girlfriend. Others are "busy" too, so... maybe you are free? Or, leave her alone and see what happens.



Music for this bot: Heaven

Artist: @ElMishisLoVer

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Sorry for such huge delay, was busy irl (definetely not playing Terraria and MGS Delta all the time). The next bot will come out with delay as well, because MGS Delta won't play itself. Most likely, I will return to posting once in a week. All in all, hope you'll like the bot, leave a comment and follow for more. Enjoy!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it. Please, in comments write if you like or dislike the bot, would help a lot.
